narrative:
Precinct Concord Roxabell (precinct in Ross County) has 834 registered voters, with 58.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.6 percentage points.
